name: Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang
address: 78-80 phố Trần Phú, Lộc Thọ, Nha Trang, Việt Nam
description:
Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang - Nơi Lý Tưởng Cho Kỳ Nghỉ Tuyệt Vời

Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang là một khách sạn 5 sao nằm tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam. Với số lượng phòng lên đến 895, khách sạn này mang đến không gian rộng rãi và thoải mái cho du khách. Được xây dựng vào năm 2018, Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang là một trong những khách sạn mới nhất ở thành phố này. Vị trí của khách sạn cách trung tâm thành phố chỉ 0km, giúp du khách dễ dàng tiếp cận các điểm tham quan và mua sắm. 

Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang cung cấp dịch vụ nhận phòng từ 02:00 PM và nhận phòng đến 12:00 PM. Điều này giúp du khách có thời gian linh hoạt để kiểm tra vào và ra khỏi khách sạn. Đặc biệt, khách sạn này cho phép trẻ em từ 0 đến 3 tuổi lưu trú miễn phí. Đây là một lợi thế lớn cho các gia đình có trẻ nhỏ muốn trải nghiệm kỳ nghỉ tại Nha Trang.

Trải nghiệm giải trí tuyệt vời tại Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang

Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang không chỉ là một khu nghỉ dưỡng sang trọng mà còn cung cấp đa dạng các tiện nghi giải trí độc đáo. Khách hàng có thể tận hưởng trọn vẹn kỳ nghỉ của mình với các cửa hàng, quầy bar và cửa hàng quà lưu niệm tại khu nghỉ dưỡng. Tại đây, bạn có thể tìm thấy những món quà độc đáo để tặng người thân và bạn bè, hoặc thưởng thức những món đồ uống thơm ngon tại quầy bar.

Ngoài ra, Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang còn cung cấp các dịch vụ chăm sóc sức khỏe và thư giãn tuyệt vời. Bạn có thể tận hưởng những liệu pháp massage chuyên nghiệp, thư giãn trong bồn nước nóng, hay thư giãn tại phòng xông hơi và spa. Đây là những trải nghiệm thú vị giúp bạn thư giãn và tái tạo năng lượng sau một ngày dạo chơi tại biển.

Cơ sở vật chất thể thao tại Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang

Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang là một kỳ quan thể thao với các cơ sở vật chất hiện đại và đa dạng. Khách sạn có hồ bơi trong nhà tiện nghi, nơi bạn có thể tận hưởng một buổi tập luyện mát mẻ và thư giãn. Ngoài ra, Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang còn có phòng tập thể dục miễn phí, giúp bạn duy trì sức khỏe và thể hình trong suốt kỳ nghỉ của mình.

Nếu bạn muốn tận hưởng không gian ngoài trời, khách sạn cũng có hồ bơi ngoài trời và bãi biển riêng tư. Bạn có thể thỏa sức bơi lội trong nước trong lành và tắm nắng trên bãi biển tuyệt đẹp. Đồng thời, Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang còn có quầy bar bên hồ bơi, nơi bạn có thể thưởng thức đồ uống mát lạnh và thưởng thức không gian thoải mái và tuyệt vời. Với cơ sở vật chất thể thao đa dạng và tiện ích, Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang là lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho những du khách yêu thích hoạt động thể thao và tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam.

Tiện nghi thuận tiện tại Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang

Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang tọa lạc tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam, là một khách sạn đáng chú ý với nhiều tiện nghi thuận tiện. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ phòng suốt 24 giờ, giúp bạn có thể tận hưởng dịch vụ phục vụ trong phòng mọi lúc. Bạn cũng có thể sử dụng dịch vụ giặt là và dịch vụ là ủi để giữ quần áo luôn sạch sẽ và gọn gàng. 

Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang cũng mang đến cho bạn dịch vụ giữ đồ an toàn, giúp bạn yên tâm lưu trữ các vật phẩm quý giá. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có dịch vụ lễ tân, sẵn sàng hỗ trợ bạn với mọi yêu cầu và thông tin du lịch. Wi-Fi miễn phí cung cấp trong khu vực chung và trong tất cả các phòng, giúp bạn kết nối với thế giới mọi lúc. Dịch vụ giữ hành lý và dịch vụ dọn phòng hàng ngày cũng được cung cấp để đảm bảo bạn có một kỳ nghỉ tiện lợi và thoải mái tại Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang.

Tiện ích giao thông tại Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang

Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang cung cấp nhiều tiện ích giao thông để đảm bảo du khách có một trải nghiệm thuận tiện và dễ dàng trong việc di chuyển. Khách sạn cung cấp dịch vụ đặt tour, giúp du khách có thể khám phá những điểm du lịch đẹp và nổi tiếng của Nha Trang. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn cung cấp dịch vụ đỗ xe valet, giúp du khách tiết kiệm thời gian và nỗ lực khi tìm chỗ đỗ xe. Khách sạn cũng cung cấp dịch vụ đặt vé và dịch vụ taxi, giúp du khách dễ dàng di chuyển trong thành phố.

Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang cũng có bãi đỗ xe miễn phí và bãi đỗ xe trên chỗ, đảm bảo rằng du khách sẽ không gặp khó khăn khi tìm chỗ đỗ xe. Tuy nhiên, lưu ý rằng có một số khoản phí áp dụng cho việc đỗ xe tại khách sạn. Với những tiện ích giao thông này, Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang đảm bảo rằng du khách sẽ có một trải nghiệm du lịch dễ dàng và thuận tiện.

Sự đa dạng của các tiện nghi ẩm thực tại Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang

Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang là một điểm đến tuyệt vời cho những ai đam mê ẩm thực. Khách sạn này cung cấp nhiều tiện nghi ẩm thực đa dạng để đáp ứng mọi nhu cầu của khách hàng.

Đầu tiên, bạn có thể tận hưởng dịch vụ phòng 24 giờ mỗi ngày tại Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang. Bất kể bạn muốn thưởng thức một bữa ăn nhẹ hay một bữa ăn nhanh, nhân viên phục vụ phòng sẽ đáp ứng mọi yêu cầu của bạn.

Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn có một quầy cà phê tuyệt vời. Bạn có thể thưởng thức những tách cà phê thơm ngon và thư giãn trong không gian ấm cúng. 

Cuối cùng, Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang còn có một nhà hàng sang trọng. Với không gian rộng rãi và thiết kế đẹp mắt, nhà hàng này là nơi lý tưởng để thưởng thức những món ăn đa dạng từ khắp nơi trên thế giới. Bạn có thể tận hưởng bữa sáng tự chọn hàng ngày hoặc thưởng thức những món ăn ngon trong không gian lịch sự và thoải mái.

Với sự đa dạng của các tiện nghi ẩm thực tại Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang, bạn sẽ không bao giờ phải lo lắng về việc tìm kiếm một nơi để thưởng thức những món ăn ngon và thỏa mãn khẩu vị của mình.

Phòng nghỉ tại Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang

Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang tọa lạc tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam, với nhiều loại phòng đa dạng để lựa chọn. Khách sạn có 2 loại phòng 2 phòng ngủ với view biển, rộng 67 mét vuông và 81 mét vuông, đi kèm với giường đơn hoặc giường đôi. Ngoài ra, khách còn có thể lựa chọn các phòng Studio với view biển và diện tích từ 41 đến 55 mét vuông, với giường đơn hoặc giường đôi. Đặt phòng tại Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang thông qua Agoda, bạn sẽ được hưởng mức giá tốt nhất và trải nghiệm đặt phòng dễ dàng và không gặp rắc rối.

Lộc Thọ - Khu vực xung quanh Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang

Lộc Thọ là một khu vực nằm trong phạm vi gần của Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang, tại thành phố du lịch Nha Trang, Việt Nam. Với vị trí thuận lợi, du khách có thể dễ dàng tiếp cận các điểm tham quan, nhà hàng, cửa hàng, và các dịch vụ tiện ích khác trong khu vực này.

Lộc Thọ nổi tiếng với những bãi biển tuyệt đẹp, cát trắng mịn và nước biển trong xanh. Du khách có thể thả mình vào làn nước mát lạnh và tận hưởng không gian biển rộng lớn. Ngoài ra, khu vực này cũng có nhiều hoạt động giải trí và thể thao ngoài trời như lướt ván, lặn biển, và chèo thuyền kayak.

Không chỉ có biển, Lộc Thọ cũng nằm gần các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng khác của Nha Trang như Vinpearl Land và Tháp Bà Ponagar. Du khách có thể dễ dàng tham quan và khám phá những điểm đến này để trải nghiệm văn hóa và lịch sử độc đáo của vùng đất này. Với sự kết hợp giữa thiên nhiên tuyệt đẹp và các hoạt động giải trí phong phú, Lộc Thọ là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho những ai muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ thú vị tại Nha Trang.

Cách di chuyển từ sân bay gần Nha Trang đến Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang

Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang là một khu nghỉ dưỡng sang trọng nằm ở Lộc Thọ, Nha Trang, Việt Nam. Để đến đây từ sân bay, bạn có một số lựa chọn di chuyển thuận tiện và dễ dàng.

Sân bay quốc tế Cam Ranh là sân bay gần nhất với khoảng cách khoảng 40 km từ Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang. Từ sân bay, bạn có thể sử dụng dịch vụ xe đưa đón hoặc taxi để đến đích. Dịch vụ xe đưa đón là một lựa chọn phổ biến và tiện lợi, với nhiều công ty cung cấp dịch vụ này tại sân bay. Bạn có thể đặt trước hoặc tìm một xe đưa đón tại quầy thông tin sân bay. Ngoài ra, bạn cũng có thể sử dụng dịch vụ taxi, với nhiều hãng taxi có mặt tại sân bay để đưa bạn đến Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang.

Ngoài ra, bạn cũng có thể sử dụng dịch vụ xe buýt hoặc xe đường sắt để đến Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang. Tuy nhiên, việc sử dụng các phương tiện công cộng này có thể mất thời gian hơn và yêu cầu bạn có kiến thức về lộ trình và lịch trình của chúng. Vì vậy, nếu bạn muốn di chuyển một cách nhanh chóng và thuận tiện, dịch vụ xe đưa đón hoặc taxi là lựa chọn tốt nhất.

Khám phá những điểm tham quan nổi tiếng gần Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang

Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang nằm gần một số điểm tham quan nổi tiếng tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam. Khách sạn này chỉ cách Biển Nha Trang và Central Park vài bước chân. Biển Nha Trang là một trong những bãi biển đẹp nhất Việt Nam, với cát trắng mịn và nước biển trong xanh. Du khách có thể thư giãn trên bãi biển, tắm nắng và tham gia các hoạt động thể thao nước tại đây.

Ngoài ra, Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang cũng nằm gần Phòng tranh Mai Lộc và Story Beach & Pool. Phòng tranh Mai Lộc là một điểm đến tuyệt vời cho những ai yêu nghệ thuật, với những bức tranh đẹp và sáng tạo. Story Beach & Pool là một khu vui chơi nước thú vị cho cả gia đình. Du khách có thể tham gia các trò chơi nước, trượt cỏ và thưởng thức đồ ăn ngon tại đây. Với vị trí thuận lợi, Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang là nơi lý tưởng để khám phá những điểm tham quan nổi tiếng của Nha Trang.

Những nhà hàng xung quanh Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang

Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang cung cấp nhiều lựa chọn nhà hàng ngay trong khu vực lân cận. Khách có thể thưởng thức các món ăn tuyệt vời tại Sailing Club Nha Trang, Pizza 4P's Nha Trang, Skylight Nha Trang, Louisiane Brewhouse, Mix Greek Restaurant, Quinter Central Nha Trang, Chuon Chuon Kim Restaurant, Iced Coffee Simply Original, Greek Souvlaki Nha Trang và Ngon Gallery Nha Trang Restaurant. Với sự đa dạng về món ăn và phong cách, du khách sẽ không bao giờ cảm thấy nhàm chán khi thưởng thức các món ăn ngon tại những nhà hàng này.

Mua sắm tại các điểm đến xung quanh Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang

Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang nằm gần nhiều điểm mua sắm hấp dẫn. Du khách có thể tìm thấy những món đồ thú vị tại Vật lý trị liệu bãi biển Nha Trang, Nhà may Hội An và Tranh thêu lụa XQ. Nếu bạn đam mê thời trang, hãy ghé qua Áo thun vẽ tay Kim Quang và Cửa hàng Amart để mua sắm những món đồ độc đáo. Đối với những người muốn mua sắm quà lưu niệm độc đáo, Da cá sấu Anh Thư là địa điểm không thể bỏ qua. Ngoài ra, du khách cũng có thể khám phá các trung tâm mua sắm như Trung tâm Nha Trang để thỏa sức mua sắm. Không chỉ có những điểm mua sắm, Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang cũng gần Trung tâm lặn biển Rainbow Divers và Nhà hàng bia Tiệp Hoàng Gia, cho phép du khách tham gia vào các hoạt động thú vị và thưởng thức ẩm thực độc đáo.

Giá phòng trung bình tại Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang

Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang là một lựa chọn tuyệt vời cho du khách muốn tận hưởng kỳ nghỉ tại thành phố Nha Trang, Việt Nam. Với giá phòng trung bình là $67, Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang cung cấp một trải nghiệm đáng giá cho giá trị của bạn. Điều này cũng tương đương với giá trung bình của một phòng khách sạn tại Nha Trang. Với sự tiện nghi hiện đại và dịch vụ chuyên nghiệp, bạn sẽ tận hưởng một kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại đây.

Kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời tại Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang

Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang là sự lựa chọn hoàn hảo cho kỳ nghỉ tuyệt vời. Với vị trí tuyệt vời, nhân viên thân thiện và bữa sáng tuyệt ngon, khách sạn này thực sự đáng để trải nghiệm. Phòng ốc rộng rãi, sạch sẽ và có cảnh quan đẹp. Cảm ơn đội ngũ nhân viên tuyệt vời đã mang đến cho chúng tôi một kỳ nghỉ đáng nhớ. Ngoài ra, khách sạn còn cung cấp dịch vụ tốt và có tầm nhìn tuyệt đẹp. Đây là một khách sạn đáng giới thiệu cao. Nhân viên thân thiện và phản hồi nhanh chóng. Vị trí khách sạn rất tốt, đặc biệt phù hợp cho cặp đôi với dịch vụ spa, hồ bơi có quầy bar và cocktail.

Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang - Một điểm đến hoàn hảo với đánh giá tốt từ khách hàng

Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang là một khách sạn đáng chú ý tại Nha Trang, Việt Nam, với đánh giá chung 9.1/10 từ khách hàng. Khách sạn này đã nhận được nhiều lời khen ngợi về giá trị và tiện nghi. Với điểm 9.0 cho giá trị, Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang cung cấp một trải nghiệm đáng giá cho giá tiền. Khách hàng đã đánh giá cao sự tiện nghi và chất lượng dịch vụ tại khách sạn này.

Với điểm 9.2 cho sự sạch sẽ, Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang tự hào là một điểm đến tuyệt vời cho những ai quan tâm đến vệ sinh và sự sạch sẽ. Khách sạn này được duy trì và quản lý rất cẩn thận, mang lại cho khách hàng cảm giác thoải mái và an tâm trong suốt thời gian lưu trú.

Nằm ở vị trí đẹp, với điểm 9.4 cho vị trí, Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang là một điểm đến lý tưởng cho du khách muốn khám phá vẻ đẹp của thành phố Nha Trang. Với khả năng tiếp cận dễ dàng đến các điểm tham quan nổi tiếng và các khu vui chơi giải trí, khách sạn này mang đến cho du khách một trải nghiệm du lịch tuyệt vời. Đội ngũ nhân viên cũng được đánh giá cao với điểm 9.1 cho hiệu suất làm việc, đảm bảo rằng mọi nhu cầu của khách hàng được đáp ứng một cách tốt nhất.

grades.name: Sự thoải mái và chất lượng phòng

tags.tag: Tiện ích tại cơ sở lưu trú

demographics.name: Gia đình có thanh thiếu niên

sample_comments.text: Tôi đã đưa mẹ vợ đi cùng 4 người lớn và rất hài lòng. Có 2 phòng ngủ và 2 phòng tắm. Nơi này nằm ngay trước bãi biển, rất dễ tiếp cận, và kích thước phòng cùng với độ sạch sẽ rất tuyệt vời. Bữa sáng và hồ bơi cũng thật tuyệt vời, nhờ vào thái độ thân thiện của nhân viên và dịch vụ dọn phòng, tôi đã có một kỳ nghỉ thoải mái. Các tiện nghi phụ cũng được trang bị đầy đủ, tổng thể đây là một chỗ ở có giá trị tốt.
sample_comments.title: Kỳ nghỉ gia đình tuyệt nhất
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
 
Thank you for choosing to stay at Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang. We are delighted to hear that your overall stay met your expectations and we hope that we exceeded them. Once again, we thank you for your comments. 
We look forward to the opportunity of seeing you and your beloved ones in the near future.
 
Sincerely,
Pham The Nhan (Mr.)
Director of Operations
sample_comments.room_type: Grand Suite hướng biển 2 phòng ngủ

sample_comments.title: Trên Trung Bình
sample_comments.negatives: Thông tin trên booking.com không rõ ràng, không có dịch vụ đưa đón sân bay, không upgrade được bữa sáng.

sample_comments.title: Rất tốt
sample_comments.positives: Friendly staff, good breakfast, and close to the beach.
sample_comments.negatives: Construction on the beach, far walk to center, breakfast area too busy, and many locals hanging out in the lobby making loud noises.

sample_comments.text: Gần đây tôi đã tìm được một khách sạn rẻ hơn so với các khách sạn cao cấp lân cận. Một trong những khách sạn cao tầng gần bãi biển với tầm nhìn từ các tầng cao là rất thoải mái ngay cả khi là cảnh thành phố. Đúng vào thời điểm Tết, sự kiện bắn pháo hoa chào đón năm mới ở giữa thành phố thật ấn tượng và đã trở thành kỷ niệm suốt đời! Đối tượng khách chủ yếu là người Hàn Quốc và Nga. Khu vực ăn sáng được chia làm tầng 4 và 5, và khách được check-in bằng nhận diện khuôn mặt ở lối vào. Thực đơn phong phú, phở có thể chọn thịt gà hoặc thịt bò và cả hai đều ngon. Các loại bánh cũng rất đa dạng, có bánh mì Pháp và bánh sừng bò để khách có thể chọn lựa. Chỉ có một máy pha cà phê nên thường xuyên có hàng chờ. Với số lượng ghế như vậy, có lẽ nên có khoảng 3 máy để tiện hơn. Phòng có quạt trần với 3 chế độ gió khác nhau, rất thoải mái. Nếu ai cảm thấy khó chịu với tiếng quạt điều hòa khi ngủ, chỉ cần bật quạt trên trần là sẽ không bị quá nóng. Đây là một khách sạn lớn với nhiều phòng nhưng có tới 8 thang máy hoạt động nhanh chóng, thật tuyệt. Nếu có dịp đến Nha Trang, tôi sẽ muốn quay lại khách sạn này.
sample_comments.title: Thương hiệu Vinpearl đáng tin cậy!
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,

Thank you very much for your thoughtful and detailed review. We are truly delighted to know that you had such a memorable stay with us.

It is wonderful to hear that you appreciated our location near the beach, the beautiful city views from the higher floors, and especially the breathtaking Tet fireworks display. We are honored that this special moment became a lifelong memory for you.

We are also pleased that you enjoyed our breakfast selection, particularly the pho and bakery items, as well as the comfort of your room with the ceiling fan option. Your kind comments about our facilities, including the elevators and overall convenience, are greatly appreciated.

At the same time, thank you for your constructive feedback regarding the coffee machine at breakfast. We sincerely value your suggestion and will certainly take it into consideration as we continuously work to improve our guests' experience.

It would be our absolute pleasure to welcome you back on your nex

sample_comments.title: THẬT TUYỆT VỜI
sample_comments.positives: ĂN SÁNG NGON,NHIỀU MÓN,RẤT NGON VÀ TÔI THÍCH THỨC ĂN VIỆT TẠI ĐÂY,NÓI CHUNG LÀ RẤT OK VỚI BỮA SÁNG TẠI ĐÂY,THỨC ĂN NHÀ HÀNG GỌI MÓN CŨNG NGON.

sample_comments.text: This guest did not leave comments about this hotel.
sample_comments.title: Trên cả tuyệt vời

sample_comments.text: Sạch sẽ, tiện nghi, nhân viên hiền lành thân thiện, bữa ăn sáng đa dạng, địa điểm tuyệt vời
sample_comments.title: Khách sạn tuyệt vời tại Nha Trang
sample_comments.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,

Chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã lựa chọn Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang và dành thời gian chia sẻ nhận xét tích cực.

Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng Quý khách hài lòng với độ sạch sẽ, tiện nghi, sự thân thiện của nhân viên, bữa sáng đa dạng cũng như vị trí thuận lợi của khách sạn. Những lời khen của Quý khách là động lực để chúng tôi không ngừng nâng cao chất lượng dịch vụ.

Chúng tôi mong được chào đón Quý khách trở lại trong những kỳ nghỉ tiếp theo.

Trân trọng,
Phạm Thế Nhân
Giám đốc Vận hành
Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang
sample_comments.room_type: Studio hướng biển có giường đôi

sample_comments.title: Tuyệt vời
sample_comments.positives: Địa điểm trung tâm, nhân viên thân thiện, dịch vụ tốt

sample_comments.text: This guest did not leave comments about this hotel.
sample_comments.title: Chấp nhận được

sample_comments.text: Resort siêu đẹp, mình đi mấy nơi ở Cam Ranh r nhưng ở đây mình thấy đẹp nhất nha. Buffet sáng tối có những món bị trùng lặp nên hơi ngán, mà nói chung mình đi mấy nơi ở Cam Ranh r thì k thấy nơi nào hợp vị cả. Nhưng nói chung ăn uống cũng chỉ cần no để có sức chơi thôi . Biển sạch đẹp, lâu lâu nv sẽ đi dọc bờ biển nhặt rác rất ok nha. Hồ bơi nước ngọt và mặn luôn nên rất tuyệt. Nhưng lại ít đầu tư về mặt giải trí cho trẻ em nên hơi buồn. Dọn phòng cũng còn chậm, mình đi chơi từ sáng tới 2h chiều cho bé nghỉ ngơi mới có nv tới gõ của dọn phòng. Tuy vậy vẫn đánh giá cao, sẽ quay lại.

sample_comments.title: Looks nice on the surface but is overpriced, undermaintained and poorly executed.
sample_comments.positives: Breakfast was OK, lots of options. Very central location. WiFi worked well. Towels provided at beach and pool.
sample_comments.negatives:
Hot food at the breakfast buffet was not kept hot, heat lamps were completely ineffective, significant food safety issue. Always had to queue for eggs and coffee at breakfast.

Pool area and beach area were tiny and had maybe a dozen sunbeds for a 40 floor hotel. Beach is not private at all and is across the road. Pool was also an absolute wind tunnel if there was any amount of breeze. Carpet in the hallways was filthy and worn.

Shower was not properly cleaned with mold growing in the sealant at the corners. Sliding doors to the balcony were single glazed meaning the road noise and noise from the two nearby beach clubs was barely muffled when they were closed, noise levels in the area are very high until at least midnight. Aircon in the room couldn't keep up during the day requiring the curtains to be closed all day to keep the room cool. Multiple doors on our floor didn't close without pulling them very hard as they were scraping on the frame. The door locks beep constantly if not fully closed so on multiple occasions neighbors doors were beeping constantly. Bed was rock hard.

Cleaning staff also pressured me into leaving a positive google review which I have since deleted. All of theses issues have been expressed in many previous reviews yet nothing has changed and I don't think it ever will, you'd be wise to stay elsewhere.

Trần Duy Quang | General Manager

sample_comments.title: Not 5 star hotel, do not stay
sample_comments.positives: N/A
sample_comments.negatives:
We stayed at other 5 star hotels in Vietnam and we are still not sure how this Vinpearl hotel is a "5 star" hotel with 4.9 star reviews. This Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang was the worst stay during our time in Vietnam. A few things to call out:
1. The rooms are outdated. We stayed in room 2027 and the bathroom was tiny. The fridge also did not work so all of our drinks were warm in the Vietnam heat.
2. The hotel is right across from a Sailing Club. This club blast loud EDM music Friday to Sunday night till 2am where you can clearly hear it through your balcony doors. Bring ear plugs if you plan to come.
3. Luggage storage was a hot mess. They store everyone's luggage all over the first floor lobby in the open. When we went to retrieve our luggage, the bell boy asked us to find our luggage. We looked all over the lobby and thankfully we found it but def not 5 star like

sample_comments.title: Horrendous and Disappointing
sample_comments.positives: The only thing I liked about this property is its location!
sample_comments.negatives:
Extremely Horrendous!
First, the check-in process was not smooth. As we arrived by car at the front of the hotel, no one came to pick up our stuff (only until we asked someone to help us). Then, I went up to the reception but she told me to wait 5 minutes (there were 2 other receptionists not doing anything).

Second, the rooms did NOT live up to their 5 stars standards! We booked 2 rooms and both of them are dirty and facilities have gone down/old. As seen in the pictures, there were yellow stains in the bathroom; chipped side table; stain on fresh mattress; water or dirty liquid stains on the curtains!

Third, terrible communication between the staff members when they changed shifts. We complained about how dirty the rooms were to the reception desk so a receptionist (manager) called us via the room's phone to ask if they could go up to our rooms and take a look at the rooms' condition. We said that we would call them after 30 minutes as we were still resting in our rooms! Surprise surprise! When I called them back, a receptionist answered and did NOT know anything I was talking about and asking me why they would need to go up to our rooms and inspect???

Fourth, bad time management! They offered to change rooms for us but it took almost 4 hours of going back and forth trying to figure out why the rooms weren't up to standards and which other rooms they could move us to. My partner and I flew from Canada the day before so we were extremely jet-lagged! The lack of communication and urgency was absolutely disappointing! I expect SO MUCH more from a 5-star hotel!

Fifth, after we were moved to different rooms, we found out that there were no complimentary mini bars in the new rooms! The next morning, I then told the receptionist at the restaurant to tell someone to bring the complimentary drinks and snacks to our new rooms. Surprise again :) When we were back after the trip to VinWonders, there was still NOTHING in the fridge!

sample_comments.title: Loud music. Can't sleep. Rude staff. Elevators are a nightmare!
sample_comments.positives: The proximity to the beach.
sample_comments.negatives: The front desk clerk was pushy and rude, trying to sell me VinWonders tickets. There is a 'Beach Club' across the street that plays very loud music and won't let me sleep unless I have the air conditioner on to not hear it. If you are on the 30th floor and you want to go down to the lobby at 9 am, you will stop at every floor on the way down because there are so many people, and it will take you up to 10-15 minutes to go from your room to the lobby.

sample_comments.title: Never again
sample_comments.text:
This place is completely run down and does not deserve a five-star rating. When we checked in, the room was dirty --- I even found a used condom in the bathtub. On top of that, the window glass had inappropriate marks that made the room feel disgusting.

The air conditioning didn't work properly, and staff had to keep coming to fix it throughout the day. The food was disappointing, and overall, this hotel is not suitable for families.

It seems more like a place for foreigners looking for one-night encounters rather than a clean, comfortable stay. Stay away from this place --- it's not worth your money or your time.

sample_comments.title: Save your money and go down the beach or into the city, glorified 4-star hotel at best.
sample_comments.positives: The hotel is in a great spot, just a couple minutes walk from the beach, and has an indoor pool, massage area, and an indoor gym that I used a few times with no issues. It's also pretty easy to get to and from the hotel and to wherever you want to go in the city.
sample_comments.negatives: A lot of things: upon check in around 1800, with no one standing in the queues and 3 receptionists, no one bothered to look up from their desk so I stood waiting for a couple minutes until a kind woman ran over and nudged the reception to do something (one also made eye contact with me and did nothing). Going up to my room I was told my bag would be brought up, which took exactly 33 minutes to get, I should have just taken it myself. Unfortunately the room I paid for with the "ocean view" wasn't much of an ocean, just me looking into another building, and it was really more of a city view than ocean view. I also requested a specific room, which they clearly didn't even try to look at or accommodate for which bothered me greatly. The sound of all the street noise bounces between the two buildings and echoes into your room. The overall demeanor of the staff on checkout was also horrendous. Yes I understand everyone's trying to get out/in, but don't take your frustrations out on the customer. It took about 10 minutes to check out. Overall, when I compare this "5-star" hotel to many others I have stayed at, this is a glorified 4-star hotel, nothing about this hotel is 5-stars. It's also overly packed with Russians and Koreans who think they are getting a 5-star hotel at 4-star price, when in actuality they are not. Your better off taking your money down the road, pay the extra $100-200 and avoid this place. You can go a little further into the city and still get to the beach no problem and pay half of what you pay at this overrated hotel. Honestly I have stayed at 3-star hotels with better customer service than this place. Elevators also take a hot minute to go up/down, and there is no indication of which elevator will be arriving first, you just hear a ding and 1/6 elevators opens (most elevators have a flashing light or something, which you would expect for a "5-star" hotel, but not here).

sample_comments.title: Very Very Bad service
sample_comments.text:
Room is very basic. Room did not have room service menu. I called the service desk 3 times for the menu never got it. Call and spoke to the manager for the menu and never got it until after I ordered and received food and finished my food from outside the hotel then they came to my room with the room service menu. The AC did not work. I went to the concierge desk and was told to "go over there to the check in station, we don't do it here". The mini bar fridge is warm. 

This is a typical Vietnamese own and operated hotel so once they swiped your credit card they got your money. They don't care if the customer ever comes back since they still have a steady stream of new Chinese tourist coming. This is why Vietnam known for cheap place for tourism, great food, great culture yet on only 8% of tourists come back to Vietnam for tourism for a second time while Thailand has 54% returning for tourism. 

So if you come to Nha Trang, spend a little more money on well known western hotels to save yourself from the aggravation and stay away from the 3 Vinpearl hotels. Their employees and Managers just don't care about their customers.

sample_comments.title: This was the most expensive of the 4 hotels I stayed. The others were in Hanoi, Ha Long, Da Lat, and Nha Trang. This h
sample_comments.positives: The room was excellent. We had a two bedroom suite. It was very nicely furnished and had a great balcony view. Beds were very comfortable.
sample_comments.negatives:
1. The elevators were hot making them uncomfortable. 

2. Beyond the first floor the elevators were very confusing. When the elevator arrives, there is no audible noise nor light indicator that would indicate its arrival. Often I would miss the open elevator. Other customers were having the same problem.

3. It was quite warm in the main lobby and especially in the breakfast buffet area. I could not enjoy myself due to sweating from the heat.

4. The hallways on floor 34 of our suite were not ventilated well. The AC did not appear to be on. It was also quite hot.

5. The breakfast was overcrowded on the mornings I was there.

6. Bananas would be welcomed. It is the number one breakdast fruit worldwide.

7. The breakfast buffet was not appealing and tasteful. It appeared to be made for the masses and not hotel customers.

As you can see above, indoor temperature comfort was very lacking and effected the overall experience.

sample_comments.title: too noisy, wont return, not all the hotel's fault, but quiet spaces are needed.. please..
sample_comments.positives: the beds were comfortable, staff was responsive.
sample_comments.negatives: the noise coming from the street was excessive, and I was at the 40th floor.. the mgmt seemed to know this was going to happen because apparently the mayor had OKd the music from the beach area late - until 12 or 1230 am, they told me, so, they offered to move me to another room.. on the same side as where the noise was coming from, but a lower floor, which would have made things worse. Why this wasnt obvious to them I dont know. So they let me have an EXTRA room to sleep in where the noise was less. This was a decent result, but it was on the opposite side where the noise was better but still street noise, ambulances, etc.. But a better sleep for sure.. On top of that, no matter where we went, there was noise.. The vietnamese are constantly honking their horns, and quiet is hard to find: every restaurant, even stores, often have music playing.. and its not massage studio music with harps and quiet flutes.. Even the ice cream tricycle vendor wont have gnetle jingle bells, -ts EDM etc.. yep, not kidding. . This is especially annoying when you want to find places to relax.. like by an ocean, or pool. But.. they have to have this incessant Techno dance music playing at the pool too. Also, the same, at louder volume, in the workout gym. Why ? I dont know. Perhaps its in the international hospitality industry handbook on page 1 par. 1 where it states: " Assume almost all of your clients are in their 20s ... and in addition , are alcoholics who are likely drunk before 2 pm.. This group will be ecstatic when they go to the gym to listen to your piped in EDM at high volume.. Also, they do NOT want to relax by the pool , so make sure this music is playing incessantly there too.". So, i think anyone can get my point: IF you create quiet spaces NOONE will complain.. If you create NOISY spaces, SOME at least WILL complain.. logic leads anyone with half a brain in the hospitality industry to make the proper choice.

sample_comments.title: Overated
sample_comments.text: Pre-covid, this hotel would be at the best location, but now there is nothing around this hotel because almost all the bars and restaurants nearby are closed and out of business. This is a huge hotel and they are definitely short-staffed to handle the volume of guests so services are poor at best if not terrible. Breakfast buffet was terrible. They're always out of food regardless what time we showed up for breakfast. The eggs station guy was very rude but I don't blame him because he's they only one servicing the eggs station for hundred (yes hundreds) of guest at a time so you'll have to wait for awhile to fight for the eggs he threw over to the eggs plate. Housekeeping was very bad. 3 people came to clean our room and all they did was rearranged the pillows and the cover to look like they made the bed. Housekeeping were in our room for less that 3 minutes. They did not empty the trash and did not refill toiletries. For a 5-star hotel, the room is not sound proof at all. We were on 18th floor and we can hear the traffic noise and the techno music from the beach with all our windows and door closed till 2 AM. I don't blame the workers but I blame the management for not adequately staffing enough staffs to work there.

Upon going up to the elevators, many times had to wait for the second elevator because they were so packed. When we entered the room, it was musty due to humidity, and the door lock was broken. All in all, would not book again, this place was a nightmare and customer service was the worst from the hotels we booked here.

sample_comments.title: Acceptable
sample_comments.text: Большой отель,на завтрак только две кофе-машины с огромными очередями и с постоянно заканчивающимися картриджами. На пляже всего 8! Зонтиков с жезлонгами-в итоге покупаешь за 300 донгов у соседей,которые ,естественно в доле. Рядом стоят скромные отели, но у них зонтиков с шезлонгами в четыре ряда стоят-не проблема.Тупой запрет на посещение детей сауны и джакузи даже в сопровождении взрослых.Нет выхода из сауны в бассейн и обратно. То есть либо ты в бассейне, либо сдаешь полотенца и идешь в сауну уже без возможности вернуться в бассейн. Бассейн маленький и холодный.Принципиально заселяют строго в 15:00, не идут навстречу даже если ты с детьми.

Asked staff for drink, was declined. Room too warm, fridge broken. Tech said need new fridge. Informed management of experience and requested for upgrade to different room. Thanks to Ms. Tu Tran, shift manager, we upgraded to ocean view room and hotel waived upgrade fees. All in all, it made our stay much more comfortable. Thank you.

sample_comments.title: Doesn't recommend this place to anyone
sample_comments.text:
I recently stayed at Vinpearl beachfront and had a mixed experience. The check-in staff and bellboy were incredibly friendly and welcoming, which set a positive tone at the beginning of my stay. Unfortunately, that's where the good experience ended.

The housekeeping staff did not match the same level of hospitality. Their demeanor was unfriendly, and it felt like they didn't want us there at all. When I checked into my room, I was disappointed to find it dirty, with sand everywhere. I had to request a cleaning again to get it to a satisfactory level.

To make matters worse, I woke up the next morning with multiple spider bites, which was alarming and quite uncomfortable. I definitely wouldn't recommend this hotel for families with children.

Additionally, the buffet area was uncomfortably hot, and the air conditioning didn't seem to work at all. I noticed many guests sweating while trying to enjoy their breakfast, which made for an unpleasant dining experience.

Overall, I cannot recommend [Hotel Name] based on my stay. It's clear that there are significant improvements needed in housekeeping and facilities.

We hope to have another chance to welcome you back at Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang.

sample_comments.title: My personal experience at Vinpearl Frontbeach "5-star" Hotel
sample_comments.text:
This "5-star" hotel continues to disappoint despite many conversations with management and their repeated promises to treat us better. Once again, the staff failed to deliver. When we walked in, no one greeted us---the staff were on their phones and completely ignored us. For a hotel of this caliber, that is unacceptable.

While I appreciate their efforts to offer us better service after our complaints, it should have been that way from the very beginning. On our first arrival, we were not even offered a welcome drink until after we showed our passports. Meanwhile, we saw other guests being greeted with drinks right away. Instead of being welcomed, we had to walk to the counter ourselves just to get noticed.

What makes this worse is that management tries to shift the blame onto individual staff members instead of taking responsibility for poor leadership and training. At a true 5-star property, service quality comes from strong management, not excuses. 

On top of that, we did not receive room service until we specifically asked, and we experienced repeated problems with our room keys and access. Management continues to excuse these failures by blaming staff instead of taking real responsibility.

Beyond poor service, what is most disappointing is the way they treat Vietnamese guests compared to foreigners. As a proud Vietnamese, I should not have to speak English or any other language just to be treated with respect at a hotel in my own country. True hospitality starts with treating your own people with dignity, not making them feel less valued. If this hotel truly wants to be recognized and respected by everyone, they need to first learn how to treat Vietnamese guests equally. Instead, this hotel prioritizes foreigners while ignoring or looking down on their own people.

Calling themselves a 5-star hotel means living up to basic standards: warm hospitality, fairness, dignity, and consistency --- not favoritism or excuses. Unfortunately, this hotel fails at all standards. Until management acknowledges these problems and stops making excuses, they will never truly deliver the service expected of a true 5-star hotel. I hope that in the future this will change and the hotel will start treating everyone equally, instead of only giving proper service to foreign visitors, and earn everyone's respect. 

Leaving Nha Trang with these disappointments is unfortunate, but I do have to admit the place itself is beautiful, with a tropical, Miami-like front beach location that makes the city shine. I sincerely hope that if I return one day with family and friends, I will have a better experience worthy of such a stunning city.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
Thank you very much for sharing your impressions of your stay with us. We are truly sorry to learn that your experience was not as seamless and welcoming as it should have been.j
It saddens us to know that there were moments where you may have felt less attended to compared to others. While this is never the way we wish our valued guests to feel, we deeply regret that this impression reached you. As a proudly Vietnamese brand, we always aim to extend the same warmth, fairness, and courtesy to everyone who visits us, and it is disheartening to think we did not fully succeed in conveying that spirit during your stay.
We sincerely appreciate your feedback, as it reminds us of the importance of consistency in every detail of service. Please allow us to extend our heartfelt apologies for the aspects that did not reflect our true hospitality.
Although this stay did not reflect the high standards we aspire to, we truly hope you will consider giving us another opportunity in

There are only 18 sunbeds around the pool and 20 on the beach for a hotel that has 900 rooms! Pool opens at 6am and shuts at 7pm its a beautiful infinity pool, but you cant get a seat full young children most of time, so when its quiet its shut, so cant swim.

sample_comments.positives: Clean, like the photos. Spa & free breakfast. Convenient location. Helpful staff.
sample_comments.negatives: Nothing

sample_comments.title: Not great and old
sample_comments.text:
Its location is great because it's near the shopping center but is very noisy. The room was small for what you paid for and was very dirty.
It is situated on the main drag which can be good and bad. The good is it close to everything. It is in the same building as Vincom Plaza since both are owned by the same multinational corp. The bad is the insufferable noise. Live music and bands play from the beach across the street which is very loud at night through the thin walls.
The hotel is not the newest and you can tell. The walls were dirty and hallway carpet looks like it needs a deep steam clean. We had a bad first impression as our plumbing was broken. Also the mini fridge barely kept drinks cold.

There are probably better options. We didn't really check the facilities. Room service runs late. Our rooms didn't get cleaned until 5pm at night.

Suites are kids friendly.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
Thank you for sharing your review. We're glad you liked our convenient location near the shopping center, but we're sorry to hear about the noise and cleanliness issues you encountered. We understand how disruptive the noise from nearby entertainment can be, and we will look into ways to reduce it.
We also apologize for the plumbing issue and the condition of the room and hallway. Your feedback is important to us, and we will address these concerns promptly to improve our guest experience.
We hope to have the chance to welcome you back in the future.
Best regards,
Pham The Nhan (Mr.) 
Director of Operations

sample_comments.title: Skin rash from swimming pool, both my wife and I
sample_comments.text:
I stayed here last year and loved it. I booked through Agoda. For some reason this year things were not the same . First they couldn't process my American Express card so a few days before arriving I get email saying update card or reservation is not valid. I did update card. I tried to call but no one answers the phone after 6 pm. I sent email with updated card information and asked for confirmation. They said they would email me as soon as it went through. They didn't. It went through and the next day they emailed me. 
I was still like ok just an issue with them not taking American Express. 
We arrived a little after 2pm (the posted check in time) after going through IDs and such they said ok have a seat it will be about 15 minutes. I asked for supervisor to explain why I can't check into room when already past check in time. He got me into my room quickly after I inquired.? 
The place looks great but ignores other services. The bartenders are not trained in the simplest of drinks and take a ridiculous amount of time preparing them. 
Both my wife and I have a strange rash skin thing from swimming in the pool. (Sorry the skin fungus my wife says it is doesn't translate to English) 
We told the reservation employee when we checked out about the skin rash , she said "sorry , I'll let the manager know later." 
So sadly I have stayed here twice and I travel to Nha Trang at least once a year. I don't believe I'll book my next stay a Vinpearl beach front. 
Disappointed

sample_comments.title: Would come back in a heartbeat.
sample_comments.positives:
- amazing value

-friendly staff
- upon checking in we realize our fridge doesn't work. They asked some maintenance guys to come fix it but it seems they couldn't fix the fridge so they brought up a full size fridge for our room to use instead! This is great since we're a family with two young children.
- we loved the infinity pool and kids play area

sample_comments.negatives: - On our first night, there was a concert/party that started from 7pm and ended at..11pm? Maybe later? I believe it was hosted outside on the amenity level so the noise was unavoidable. The music was SO LOUD. It made it difficult for our little ones to sleep.

sample_comments.text:
The room is nice and a lovely looking hotel but nothing else to offer.
We were woken up the 1st morning at 8.20am to clean our room. Are you not allowed to have a sleep in on your holiday?
Hotel does not offer any type of tourist suggestions.
The restaurant is large, good breakfast assortment but dinner it is empty and only offers menu that is the room service menu.
We were on the 18th floor beach view and could here nightclub music very loud until 2 or 3am in the morning.
Not a very restful stay.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Fiona,
Greetings from Vinpearl Condotel BeachFront Nha Trang! 
We would like to thank you for taking the time to share your feedback of your stay at Vinpearl Condotel BeachFront Nha Trang.
My sincerely apology for the inconvenience you have encountered during your stay with us.
About the dinner you mentioned, kindly be explained that our hotel is located on city center where our guests can easily find dinner spots outside hotel, therefore,for business purpose,we will only provide A la carte menu for dinner. We do hope that you can understand our situation.
Regarding to the noise disturbance outside, we have brought this to higher managment, hopefully we can solve this soon.
Once again, thank you for staying with us and we would love to welcome you back with us for another holiday.
Kind Regards.
Hotel Management.

Breakfast room staff keep taking away my untouched food, whenever I go to get more food or drink, cause I don't have enough hands to get it in one go, they would just taken my untouched food away. Four months ago, my stay was much better, this time there seem to be too many new untrained staffs. The service is not worth the price. Not a pleasant stay.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest, 

Thank you for choosing to stay at Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang. We are really sorry for the inconveniences that occurred during your stay. Our hotel always tries its best to make sure all guests have a great experience. Furthermore, our hotel appreciates your review as it highlights opportunities where we can improve our services and facilities. 
We look forward to welcoming you again on your next visit. 

Best Regards,
Pham The Nhan (Mr.) 
Director of Operations

sample_comments.title: I would come back again. We had an incredible room with full beach view.
sample_comments.positives: The staff is wonderful. We had an issue with a loud banging noise with our AC. They were quick to fix the issue. For such a large hotel, we never felt rushed or hurried with the staff.
sample_comments.negatives: It's a very big resort with a lot of guests. If that's not your jam then skip this one.

sample_comments.title: Wouldn't allow me to use breakfast
sample_comments.text: I paid for 2 adults for 10 nights, my fiancé couldn't stay with me but on the last morning we decided to have breakfast together. The staff wouldn't allow it because I'd had breakfast alone up until that last day. I went to the Sailing Club instead. You can't win when you're dealing with stupid people. Hotel was clean and in a good location but value for money wasn't good. I'll stay at the Havana next time
sample_comments.response:
Dear Mr. Derek,

We sincerely apologize for the service challenges your experience during your stay. We strive to provide the highest level of service and in this instance we clearly were not able to meet your expectations. 

Although we never want to learn that a guest has had a bad experience, comments such as yours allow us to take an honest look at our operations and make necessary improvements. We hope you will return in the future and give us a chance to re-instill your confidence in our hotel and our services.
Sincerely
Mr. Altin Yildiray - General Manager
sample_comments.room_type: Grand Ocean View Studio with King Bed

sample_comments.title: Pleasant stay and very happy
sample_comments.positives: Cleanest, location & friendly staffs
sample_comments.negatives: N/A

sample_comments.title: Disappointed
sample_comments.text:
Very disappointed with the service provided at this hotel. Check in process wasn't smooth. Staff was very unhelpful. I was waiting to be checked in. There were several staffs at the desk but no one assisted us. 
We booked a 2 bedrooms apartment. It was so small. We were unable to move around. We have issues with the facilities in the room like the basin, mini bar & air cond. the technician has to come few times to fix them. We stayed in level 37 but still can hear lots of street noise. The hotel is right opposite the a club, it's very noisy if travel with kids. However, the location is very convenient. Close to all the shops, restaurants and bars.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Guest,

Thank you for the great review of our hotel! We are glad that you enjoyed your stay and hope to see you again very soon.

Sincerely,
General Manager 
Vinpearl Condotel Beachfront Nha Trang

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives: Amazing breakfast buffet with ocean view, beautiful rooms, great service, close to everything, highly recommend!!!! 12/10!!

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.text: The location is right in the tourism center, with the beach just beside the road, and Vincom next door, which is very convenient for families. One of the four rooms had a smell of cigarette smoke, although the staff tried to find a way to remedy it. If possible, the hotel should change the cooler to a refrigerator, as this cooler cannot even chill water and the temperature is higher than room temperature. Everything else was quite good, the breakfast was diverse, room cleanliness was acceptable, and the water pressure was strong. The staff were friendly and provided good support.
sample_comments.response:
Xin chào Quý khách,

Chúng tôi xin chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã lựa chọn lưu trú tại khách sạn và dành thời gian chia sẻ những trải nghiệm của mình. Chúng tôi rất vui khi biết rằng Quý khách hài lòng với vị trí thuận tiện, bữa sáng đa dạng, chất lượng vệ sinh phòng cũng như sự thân thiện và hỗ trợ của đội ngũ nhân viên.

Bên cạnh đó, chúng tôi cũng rất cảm ơn Quý khách đã góp ý về mùi thuốc lá trong một phòng và vấn đề tủ mát. Chúng tôi thành thật xin lỗi vì sự bất tiện này và đã ghi nhận ý kiến của Quý khách để kiểm tra, cải thiện nhằm mang đến trải nghiệm tốt hơn cho khách trong thời gian tới.

Hy vọng sẽ có cơ hội được chào đón Quý khách và gia đình quay trở lại trong những chuyến du lịch sắp tới.

Trân trọng,
Phạm Thế Nhân - Giám Đốc Vận Hành

sample_comments.title: Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang
sample_comments.text: The hotel facility was across the beach which make it very convenient. To be honest, for a 5 star hotel, the rooms & facility need to be updated. The bedrooms & bathrooms were outdated (still have soap bar in bathroom) & did not fit a 5 start status in my opinion. The front dest staff was ok & professional, but seems always busy and less approachable. Overall, its disappointing for a world class Vinpearl property to be in such a run down state & still has a 5 star rating just because its beach front property.

I was sweating at night too. 2 AC air vents were shut.

Sunday and Monday night, there was some music but mostly reduced at midnight. 

Sea view is very nice.

sample_comments.title: Nearly but not Quite Good.
sample_comments.text: Very busy Hotel Vin Pearl Beachfront. Check in was difficult, but eventually sorted out. Did not like the requirement for Facial Recognition to get in to Breakfast. Room on 8th floor was quite good and nice roomy size. Excellent shower and good supply of hot water. Great view of the beach from the small balcony which had a small table and chairs. Absolute crap supply of anything to watch on TV, No BBC, CNN or any news channel at all, cannot understand this problem in a quality Hotel .. Checked out the Swimming pool but was blown away by the incoming Sea breeze, not great. Breakfast was very good with lots of food for all nationalities, but boy was it busy.. Queues for cooked eggs, Tea and coffee etc. maybe early hours would help but around 8.30am, good luck. This Hotel is situated smack in the heart of the Beach front, so nice location, and lots of good food options nearby. Staff generally were very nice and helpful, and worked to the bone by the look of it.. Melia brand Vin Pearl Hotels are better in my opinion

sample_comments.title: Too crowded
sample_comments.text: Took forever to check in. Only one group ahead of us but it took the guy 20 minutes to check them in. They had 5 receptionists and they all took forever to check people in. My guy was using a laptop which obviously wasn't connected to the hotel system because he was constantly using another receptionist desktop and she was always making him wait. If you like confusion both in the hotel and outside, then you will like VinPearl. It also took the bellhop forever to bring our bags to our room. Since the city put the main road between the hotels and the beach, it is hardly a beachfront hotel. Go in a street or two and enjoy more peace and quiet.

sample_comments.title: A wonderful & affordable stay at a five star hotel.
sample_comments.positives:
Hotel is very new & modern which provides all amenities we need (Hair dryer has high power & very efficient). Beds are very comfortable with excellent pillows. Room was spacious. I was given a room on the highest floor, 41st, with such a nice view of the city & the beach. Manager Mr. Nguyễn Hữu Nam was so caring to customers & dedicated to his job. He was very patient & showed consideration & respect for customer's opinions & was willing to go extra miles to make customers happy! Other staffs are very nice too, such as Trọng An, front receptionist; a female housekeeping personnel (sorry I forgot her name!) who came to check in person to make sure that I had all bathroom supplies that I requested. Kim Anh, restaurant manager, Bích Vy, server at buffet breakfast etc. Very good buffet breakfast with variety of delicious Vietnamese dishes (on Sat, I had shrimps & crabs rice noodles!) & other regular western dishes . I thought this was one of the best buffet I ever had in Vietnam in the last 7 years of visiting Vn from USA. 
All made my stay wonderful & memorable!
sample_comments.negatives: It would be nice if they provide liquid soap at the sink! I don't like bar soap.

sample_comments.text: Was check in at 3pm (other place 2pm). Missed communication between check in staff and luggage handler. Breakfast Buffet start at 7am (not at 6am like on there information brochure). And absolute chaos!!!!! When it comes to the buffet extremely extremely disorganized, if you're a solo traveler, I would not select the included breakfast buffet option. Because as soon as you get up to get someone food, someone will take your table absolute chaos!!!! Minbar have no information if things are free or label as complimentary or price lists. But lucky there was a market located in the same building.

Your feedback regarding the minibar information is also well noted. Should you be willing, we would welcome the opportunity to learn more details about your experience. Please feel free to contact us at info.VPCOBFNT@vinpearl.com, so we can review the matter more carefully.

sample_comments.title: Very nice accommodations, excellent breakfast buffet
sample_comments.positives:
This is a very nice building, very updated and spacious. Our room was lovely and we had a great view from our balcony given how tall this building is and we were on one of the higher floors. Everything was very clean and comfortable. Our room had a small kitchenette area with an induction stove but you're not allowed to actually cook, only for warming up good which we thought was odd. They did include complimentary beverages and a small snack bag in the mini fridge which was nice. They also give you 2 bottles of water. 

Reception staff were friendly enough but mainly focused on getting you checked in. They make you sign up for their email newsletter list on an iPad so that's something to be aware of if you prefer to opt out. They also take a photo of you and use this as face recognition to allow you into the buffet breakfast.

The breakfast buffet is AMAZING. There so much variety and everything was delicious. They also have a coffee bar where you can request espresso or blended coffees in addition to some self serve carafes. I didn't know you could order additional drinks and they don't include signage so I wish they did. The staff didn't seem super happy to do it for you either so maybe that's why. 

Overall this was a very nice and comfortable stay and decently priced for our budget.
sample_comments.negatives: Face recognition technology felt a bit invasive. They also don't warn you beforehand and just say they need to take a picture of you.

sample_comments.title: Exceptional
sample_comments.positives:
Harmonized with Popular and Classy Service.

It was my first travel in Nha Trang, and I didn't have much information. So I have stayed in the cheaper hotel which was promoted by travel agency, near Vinpearl Condotel at first night.
Then, I went around the city and found some well decorated hotel near beach. I also checked the other services,and stayed in the Vinpearl Condotel one night, and decided to stay here one more night.
Especially, it's close to the city center and also includes the comercial and cultural complex.
Above all, the promotion services are best. The price gap between hotel spa and local spa is mostly big in another hotels and resorts, but the promotion of this hotel makes it almost '0'. So I cancelled the plan on visiting local spa and got spa services twice again until check-out.The Sailing Club that is one of the popular meeting point among travelers are near here, and many beach parasols written in the Vinpearl mark are free rented. I stayed on the 38th floors, so little noise was heard.
Eventually, I have understood why there are always 'Vinpearl' - a Vinpearl hotel, a Vinpearl resort, and a Vinpearl Land.
We may have to notice that the Vinpearl Group may be dominent of accommodation business in Nha Trang.
sample_comments.negatives:
The water temperature of pool is cold.
The refrigerator is warm.

sample_comments.title: Excellent location - super convenient- but noisy
sample_comments.text: Prime location at the T-junction between Tran Phu st and Tran Quang Khai st, across Tran Phu st to the beach, next door to Vincom Center, surrounded by lots of mini marts, cafes, restaurants, etc. Laundry services not far away on Tran Quang Khai st. Staff very friendly and responsive but may need more training to provide more accurate information to guests or register guests more accurately. Room cleanliness could be improved. The view from the room I stayed (ocean view room on high floor) was amazing but the noise from nearby bars with loud music way past midnight every night was unbearable. Better to pay less for city view room and enjoy the tranquility.

sample_comments.title: Excellent hôtel, mais accès à la plage dangereux pour les piétons.
sample_comments.positives: J'ai passé deux nuits à l'hôtel et tout était parfait. Le SPA est excellent, le petit déjeuner délicieux, et la chambre avec vue sur la mer et la plage est incroyable. Le personnel et l'accueil sont également remarquables.
sample_comments.negatives:
L'absence de plages privées à l'hôtel est certes décevante, mais ce qui est véritablement préoccupant, c'est le danger auquel on s'expose en traversant le boulevard 'Trần Phú' pour accéder à la plage. Ce boulevard, sans feux rouges pour les piétons, oblige à risquer sa vie à chaque traversée. Les automobilistes et motards ne s'arrêtent jamais pour laisser passer les piétons, ce qui dénote un manque de respect pour la sécurité des autres. Le gouvernement devrait impérativement installer des feux de signalisation pour piétons à chaque passage, et appliquer des amendes sévères à ceux qui ne les respectent pas.

Il est particulièrement choquant de voir des taxis, Uber, Grab, et Xanh SM arborer des messages comme 'La vie humaine est précieuse' sur leurs tableaux de bord, tout en ignorant totalement la sécurité des piétons. Ce comportement, qui va à l'encontre de toute logique et humanité, risque de dissuader les touristes européens de revenir au Vietnam tant qu'une véritable réforme du code de la route n'est pas mise en place.

The hotel lobby is always full of people waiting, coming and going, and cars are parked tightly at the entrance. It might be due to the sink in the kitchen.

sample_comments.title: Hotel Review
sample_comments.text:
I booked an ocean view room and The view from the room was lovely. The room was quiet and comfortable. The shower was tiny but I got used to it. The housekeeping service and the hotel service was good except for the front desk staff members. They are not the most friendliest or helpful and lack in the customer service area. 
I experienced some technical WiFi issues as soon as I checked in. There was a language barrier as well as frustration with the staff members. The problem was resolved but it took a while but grateful that it was resolved. The airport transportations were included when I booked the hotel but found out that it's a public bus transport which was not communicated. I ended up catching taxi both to/from hotel/airport. The cost was quite expensive. I showed the booking info but the manager apologized but wouldn't reimburse the expense. However, she agreed to additional 2 hours for late checkout. Overall, I had a nice stay at the hotel and I would recommend the hotel but I would advise to confirmed everything in writing. 
One more thing- I am not sure if it's the cultural aspect but the front desk people with whom I encountered with have this tendency to always grab ur phone without permission which caught me off guard each time it happened. They would just take the phone off my hands whenever I would ask for information or directions. I get that their intention is to show me the map on my phone but I was uncomfortable each time it happened.

sample_comments.positives:
Der Blick aus dem Fenster war großartig!
Aber bis 2 Uhr nachts war extrem laute Musik, sodass man auch mit ohropax gar nicht schlafen konnte. Außerdem kam die hocheingestellte klimsanlage nicht gegen die Hitze an u d konnte auch nicht anders eingestellt werden. Im Zimmer immer 26 grad Unterste Grenze waren.
sample_comments.negatives: Siehe oben

sample_comments.title: Great location, rooms and food
sample_comments.text:
The location is great, but nosiy until late. We stayed on the beachfront which is beautiful, but being a light sleeper it meant I did not sleep well. If we stay again we would likely try the city view which loses that great view, but hopefully would reduce the noise.

The rooms are very nice and the breakfast buffet is one of the best in VN.

Aside from the noise level the issues I had were minor ones but caused some annoyances:
- Could not charge anything to the room so had to pay as you go. Not a big deal, but every other hotel I stay in in VN or anywhere allows you to charge to room and pay when you leave. I hadmy credit card out to give them when I checked in but they said it was not needed, they did not say it meant I had to pay as you go. Minor but an annoyance.
- The private beach area is much to small compared to other hotels its size. We saw many other private beach areas for similar size hotels that were much bigger. The first day we went we were advised there was no room and did not even have towels (which we were told to get them from the beach). Ideally they would have a spot comparable to other hotels, but if not at least advise at check-in that the beach fills up very early. Them advising it was private without the warning gives false expectations of a beach spot sizable enough for hotel guests. Again small issue, but an annoyance for a hotel of 5 stars. For a 3 star it would be fine.
- They never replaced the body wash for 2 days. The first day they did not replace when it was empty I did not complain as I brought some extra. So the second day I even took the top off the refillable container to make sure they saw it, but they cleaned the room and the top was still off. So I had to call down. They resolved immediately and someone came within 10 mins, but these are little things that all hotels should take care of, especially 5 stars.

Overall a beautiful hotel and amazing breakfast. The staff are friendly but perhaps under trained or the policies are not great. I may stay again just for the breakfast but the noise and other minor issues, will likely have me try other places first and if they are no better I may come back.
sample_comments.response:

Our hotel always tries its best to make sure all guests have a great experience. We look forward to welcoming you again on your next visit. 

Best Regards,
Pham The Nhan (Mr.)

sample_comments.title: Traumhafte Lage und Aussicht - organisatorisch mit deutlichem Verbesserungsbedarf
sample_comments.positives:
Die Lage des Hotels ist hervorragend - zentral gelegen und der Name „Beachfront" ist absolut passend. Besonders die größeren Zimmer mit Meerblick bieten eine einzigartige Aussicht auf Strand, Meer und die vorgelagerten Inseln. Die Zimmer sind großzügig, gut ausgestattet und schaffen eine sehr angenehme Atmosphäre.
Auch das Personal war überwiegend freundlich und hilfsbereit im Umgang mit den Gästen. Besonders positiv hervorzuheben ist der sehr große Balkon meines Zimmers auf der 27. Etage! gewesen, der viel Platz bot, um entspannt auch mit Gästen zusammenzusitzen und die wunderschöne Aussicht in angenehmer Atmosphäre zu genießen. Insgesamt bietet das Hotel viel Potenzial für einen wirklich schönen Aufenthalt.
sample_comments.negatives:
Das Management des Hotels war grundsätzlich freundlich und bemüht gegenüber den Gästen. Allerdings zeigte sich im täglichen Ablauf deutlich, dass es an professioneller Koordination und organisatorischer Struktur fehlt. Insbesondere im Bereich Hygiene, Reinigung und operativer Abläufe im Hospitality-Management bestehen aus meiner Sicht erhebliche Defizite.
Problematisch waren unter anderem Situationen im Frühstücks- und Buffetbereich, bei denen Sauberkeit und hygienische Standards nicht dem internationalen Niveau entsprachen, das man in dieser Kategorie erwarten darf. Auch wurden Gäste aufgrund von Überfüllung durch ungepflegte und offensichtlich nicht gereinigte Treppenhäuser in andere Bereiche umgeleitet, was keinen guten Eindruck hinterließ.
Zusätzlich wirkte die Personalorganisation überfordert: Mitarbeiter übernahmen gleichzeitig mehrere Funktionen, wodurch Qualitätsverluste entstanden. So war beispielsweise der Pool-Mitarbeiter gleichzeitig für die Ausgabe der Handtücher zuständig, was mehrfach zu Verwechslungen zwischen gebrauchten und frischen Handtüchern führte. Gleichzeitig fehlte dadurch eine angemessene Betreuung und Aufsicht im Poolbereich.
Insgesamt entsteht der Eindruck, dass das Hotel an seine organisatorischen Grenzen stößt und das Management Schwierigkeiten hat, operative Probleme frühzeitig zu erkennen und professionell zu lösen. Sehr schade, da Freundlichkeit allein langfristig keinen hochwertigen Aufenthalt sicherstellt.

sample_comments.negatives: Viel zu wenig Liegen am Strand bei der Hotelgröße...keine 10 Liegen bei Hunderten von Zimmern sind einfach viel zu wenig

sample_comments.title: Great value and great staff
sample_comments.text: We stayed for 5 nights in a room with balcony and stunning ocean views. The room was excellent. The entire staff at the hotel where always happy, friendly and helpful, especially when we had problems with Netflix, the hot water and both of us getting sick, and organising our bus trip back to Saigon. Having a hotel clinic saved a lot of hassle having to find Doctors. Huge thank you to all the staff.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
Thank you for taking the time to write this wonderful review. We are delighted you had an enjoyable stay with us. It is nice to read you particularly enjoyed our food, our facilities and our friendly staffs.
We hope to have the opportunity to welcome you back very soon.
With our kindest regards from beautiful Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang.
Warmest regards,
Pham The Nhan (Mr.) 
Director of Operations
sample_comments.room_type: Ocean View Studio with Double Bed

sample_comments.title: Gut geschlafen aber schlecht gegessen
sample_comments.positives: Lage am Strand. Kostelose Liege und Sonnenschirm und sehr zentral
sample_comments.negatives: Frühstück war umfangreich für Eiropäer und Koreaner. Ich möchte aber in Vietnam auch vietnamesisch essen, das war shehr wenig und schlecht

sample_comments.title: Ổn
sample_comments.text:
Phòng đẹp, rộng, giường ngủ êm, view đẹp. Buffet sáng đa dạng, ngon.
Tuy nhiên khách nhiều, nhân viên lễ tân không bao quát hết khách. 
Bãi xe ô tô quá nhỏ, đợi sắp xếp chỗ đậu xe lâu
sample_comments.response:
Kính gửi Quý khách,

Cảm ơn quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ đánh giá về trải nghiệm tại Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang.

Chúng tôi rất vui mừng khi biết rằng quý khách hài lòng với phòng nghỉ rộng rãi, giường ngủ êm ái và view đẹp, cũng như buffet sáng đa dạng và ngon miệng. Tuy nhiên, chúng tôi rất tiếc khi biết rằng dịch vụ lễ tân chưa đáp ứng được kỳ vọng của quý khách do số lượng khách đông và bãi đậu xe ô tô quá nhỏ gây ra sự chờ đợi lâu.

Chúng tôi xin ghi nhận những góp ý này và sẽ cải thiện dịch vụ để mang đến trải nghiệm tốt hơn cho quý khách trong những lần lưu trú tiếp theo.

Rất mong có cơ hội được chào đón quý khách trở lại Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang.

Trân trọng,
Phạm Thế Nhân - Giám Đốc Vận Hành
sample_comments.room_type: Ocean View Studio with Double Bed

sample_comments.title: Very good
sample_comments.positives: Sehr schönes Zentral gelegenes Hotel.Der Ausblick aus der 37 Etage aufs Meer ist traumhaft.Personal nett und hilfsbereit aber.....
sample_comments.negatives: Mir hat an der Unterkunft nicht gefallen das Chinesen bevorzugt werden in jedem Bereich.Wir stehen für ein Taxi an, es kommt und von hinten werden Chinesen vom Personal einfach an uns vorbei geleitet und rein ins Taxi. Beim Frühstück war es besonders schlimm, mir wurde der Stuhl weggenommen,Chinesen am Nachbartisch brauchte ihn, dann setzten sich Chinesen einfach an unseren Tisch und bedienten sich auch noch von meinem Teller. Ich fliege jetzt seit 1992 nach Vietnam,aber was die Vietnamesen sich gefallen lassen von den Chinesen ist unglaublich. Es tut mir richtig leid

sample_comments.title: Convenient & Value for the Money
sample_comments.text: Staying at vinpearl Nha Trang Beach Front for 5 nights and we were happy with the services here. The hotel is conveniently located in the middle of lot of good local restaurants. Breakfast buffet offers quit a variety of both western and Asian selection. Room was clean except for electrical outlets which many seemed to wear out; hence it's difficult to plug in if you have US based plugs. Staff is very friendly. We would stay here again in the future.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest,
Thank you for choosing to stay with us and for sharing your experience.

We are delighted to hear that you had a pleasant stay at Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang during your five nights visit. It is wonderful to know that you found our hotel conveniently located near many local restaurants and that you enjoyed the variety offered at our breakfast buffet.

Your feedback regarding the cleanliness of the room and the condition of the electrical outlets is appreciated, and we will promptly address these issues to ensure a more comfortable experience for our guests, especially those with US-based plugs.

We are also glad to hear that you found our staff to be friendly and helpful. It would be our pleasure to welcome you back for another enjoyable stay in the future.

Warmest regards,
Pham The Nhan (Mr.) 
Director of Operations

sample_comments.title: Good, but had a few issues
sample_comments.text:
Has a great location close to most attractions and restaurants and bars. Beautiful ocean views. Staff is excellent and breakfast has a lot of variety. 
Cons - Ocean view is very noisy because it faces sailing club which plays loud music till 2am. Water pressure in the bathroom was low and we did not have hot water for 2 days back to back which was quite unacceptable
sample_comments.response:
Dear Aniruddha,
Thank you for choosing Vinpearl Condotel Beachfront Nha Trang as the destination for your trip.
Our sincere apologies about the inconveniences happened to your experience. We are normally known for our exceptional attention to detail, and we regret that we missed the mark.
Thank you so much for taking the time to share your thoughts - your feedback helps us get better.
We hope to welcome you back to proof to you that we can provide you with a stay as satisfying as this one or even better.

Best Regards,
Trần Duy Quang | General Manager
sample_comments.room_type: Ocean View Studio with Double Bed

sample_comments.title: You get what you pay for
sample_comments.positives: Das Hotel ist wirklich top. Fantastische Lage, blitzsauber, klasse Personal. Ein Frühstücksbuffet vom feinsten. Die Baguettebrötchen perfekt in Konsistenz und Geschmack. Es gab eine Riesenauswahl an allen erdenklichen Speisen. Man kann gar nicht alles probieren. Das Zimmer war ein Studio mit Kingsizebett und Oceanview. Die Einrichtung wunderschön. Balkon gross, incl. kleinem Tisch und Sesseln. Eine Unterkunft zum wohlfühlen. Das ganze hat natürlich seinen Preis. Für Vietnam recht teuer aber im internationalen Vergleich für das Gebotene absolut angemessen. Wir würden es definitiv wieder wählen.
sample_comments.negatives: Wenn man überhaupt etwas finden will, dann gibt es tatsächlich ein paar Kleinigkeiten. Aber das ist kritisieren auf höchstem Niveau. Das Bad war im Vergleich zur gesamten Wohneinheit etwas klein, ebenso die Duschkabine. Beim Frühstück gibt es nur einen, sehr langsamen, Kaffeeautomat für alle. Aber auch daneben die Möglichkeit der Zubereitung durch das Personal. Die Auflagen der hoteleigenen Strandliegen sind in der Tat sehr dünn. Die könnte man durchaus mal durch bessere, komfortablere austauschen. Dass der tolle Pool, mit sehr bequemen Liegen, nur bis 13.00 Uhr Sonne hat, ist der Bauweise der Hochhäuser geschuldet.

sample_comments.title: Next choice will be different
sample_comments.text:
Front of beach, just 1min far from the beach. 
Free sunbed, kind staff. 
However there were so noisy whole day, night. Bike, car sound and song all day. 
Swimming pool is quite small. 

Staff came into the room twice without knocking 9am,11am. They just opened the door. It was very uncomfortable. 

Strongly not recommended for peaceful holiday.
sample_comments.response:
Dear EunJee,
We would like to thank you for taking the time to share your feedback of your stay at Vinpearl Condotel BeachFront Nha Trang. I do note your comments with regards to the housekeeping staff's cleaning services and shared with our respective teams accordingly. This is for our improvement of service quality. We would love to welcome you back with us for another memorable holiday.
Kind Regards.
Ngô Từ Vân | General Manager

Rất cám ơn Qúy khách đã dành thời gian quý giá của mình để chia sẻ trải nghiệm, đánh giá dịch vụ và đội ngũ nhân viên của khách sạn. Đây sẽ là cơ hội để tập thể Vinpearl BeachFront Nha Trang không ngừng chấn chỉnh, cải thiện chất lượng dịch vụ tốt hơn nữa để phục vụ du khách.
Một lần nữa chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách và rất mong được đón tiếp và phục vụ gia đình quay trở lại với Vinpearl trong thời gian sắp tới.
Trân trọng,

sample_comments.positives:
Alles Gut. Tolles Frühstück. 
Komme gerne wieder. 
-Fitness Raum könnte größer sein!

sample_comments.title: Everything is at a good level.
sample_comments.text:
Total stay of 4 nights.

The room is clean, the bed is comfortable, and the bathroom amenities are complete. Cleaning staff come every day. 
The restaurant is spacious, but the taste of the food is mediocre and quite repetitive. After staying for 4 nights, it gets a bit boring as there isn't much variety. However, the coffee is quite good; it has a strong flavor and uses good coffee beans.
Kids club - There is nothing but a TV and a few small Lego bricks. The room is spacious but lacks toys. Older kids may not want to use the service because there is almost nothing to play with. Activities (which have a fee) include making bracelet strings and coloring plaster.
Beach - The hotel's seating is very limited, and there are not enough sunshades for tourists. The staff at the beach is not okay at all. There is no service mindset, and no one answers any questions.

When asked if I would come back to stay here again, I might because the cost is not expensive, which is acceptable for what I received.
sample_comments.response:
Dear Valued Guest, 
 
Thank you for choosing to stay at Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang. We are really sorry for the inconveniences that occurred during your stay. Our hotel always tries its best to make sure all guests have a great experience. Furthermore, our hotel appreciates your review as it highlights opportunities where we can improve our services and facilities.
We look forward to welcoming you again on your next visit.
 
Best Regards,
Pham The Nhan (Mr.)
Director of Operations

sample_comments.title: Beachfront property in Nha trang.
sample_comments.text: Worth the stay for the money. Great room. My only annoyance is for such a huge property the pool is quite small and not many sun loungers. We prefer the beach so it wasn't a big deal but all the private sunbeds on the beach are taken quite early also. Besides that. Excellent hotel for the cost. Would stay again for sure.

Once again, we sincerely thank you and look forward to welcoming and serving you back to Vinpearl in the near future.

sample_comments.title: Mooie kamer en vlakbij het strand
sample_comments.positives: Aan het strand
sample_comments.negatives: Geen

sample_comments.title: So check carefully if there is breakfast, children are charged extra.
sample_comments.text: I booked on Agoda where the advertisement stated breakfast was included, but upon arrival, I found out I had to tick something in the options. Before I went, I messaged the website about checking the room but received no response; I had to call the hotel, and they were also unclear about how the payment worked. At the reception, there were mostly trainees, and while attending to one guest, they were answering questions from multiple other guests, which was very unsatisfactory. The welcome drinks were inconsistent; some guests got them while others did not due to the crowd. My 5-year-old child slept in the same bed, not on an extra bed, yet we were charged a fee. I paid for breakfast two times but I think it's better to eat out. The best point of this place is that it is close to the center and clean.
sample_comments.response:
Kính chào Quý khách,

Trước hết, Vinpearl Beachfront Nha Trang chân thành cảm ơn Quý khách đã dành thời gian chia sẻ trải nghiệm của mình. Chúng tôi rất tiếc khi biết rằng kỳ nghỉ của Quý khách chưa thật sự trọn vẹn và xin được gửi lời xin lỗi chân thành vì những bất tiện đã xảy ra.

Về thông tin bữa sáng và phụ thu cho trẻ em, chúng tôi sẽ rà soát lại nội dung hiển thị trên các kênh đặt phòng để đảm bảo rõ ràng hơn. Theo chính sách của khách sạn, trẻ em trên 4 tuổi sẽ được phụ thu khi ngủ chung giường với bố mẹ và sử dụng các dịch vụ kèm theo như bữa sáng, tuy nhiên chúng tôi sẽ làm tốt hơn trong việc giải thích cụ thể cho khách trước khi nhận phòng.

Chúng tôi cũng ghi nhận góp ý của Quý khách về quy trình nhận phòng, đồ uống chào đón và chất lượng bữa sáng, và sẽ phối hợp với các bộ phận liên quan để cải thiện, nhằm mang đến trải nghiệm đồng nhất và dễ chịu hơn cho mọi khách lưu trú.

Rất mong sẽ có cơ hội được đón tiếp và phục vụ Quý khách tốt hơn trong những lần ghé thăm Nha Trang
